brief_html: This message verifies a server's signature, which is based on the server's IP. The signature is optionally (currently sent only with Warcraft 3) sent in SID_AUTH_INFO (0x50).
remarks_html: This message verifies a server's signature, which is based on the server's IP. The signature is optionally (currently sent only with Warcraft 3) sent in SID_AUTH_INFO (0x50).
